memoryArtifacts.description: Rose Peyton was born in 1446 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England. She married Robert Freville in 1467 in England. They had two children during their marriage. She died on May 31, 1529, in Cambridge, C …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Rose Peyton's source to indicate she probably was the daughter of Thomas Peyton AND Margaret (Francis) Peyton.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose Peyton於1446年5月31日出生在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆時，她的父親Thomas de Peyton29歲，母親Margaret Bernard29歲。她於1467年與Robert Freville在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年5月31日在英國坎布利其爾蕾托 謝爾福德享年83歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Rose Peyton was born on 31 May 1446, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Thomas de Peyton, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Bernard, was 29. She married Robert Freville in 1467, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 31 May 1529, in Little Shelford, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose Peyton est née le 31 mai 1446, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Peyton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bernard, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Freville en 1467, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 mai 1529, à Little Shelford, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose Peyton am 31. Mai 1446 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Peyton 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bernard 29. Sie hat 1467 in England Robert Freville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Mai 1529 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Little Shelford, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

ko.Little Shelford, Cambridge, England: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 리틀 셸퍼드 인데펜덴트
ko.lifeSummary: Rose Peyton(이)가 1446년 5월 31일 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Peyton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bernard(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1467년 영국에서 Robert Freville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 5월 31일 영국 캄브리지실르 리틀 셸퍼드에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Freville em 1467, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Little Shelford, Cambridge, England: литл шелфорд индепендент, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose Peyton родилась 31 мая 1446 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Peyton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bernard, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Freville в 1467 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 31 мая 1529 г. в местности литл шелфорд, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия.
